title: Settings

workTypeEditor.editorDescription: Choose how this work is counted.
workTypeEditor.deactivateDescription: Historical work entries stay intact. This work type simply becomes unavailable for new entries.
workTypeEditor.savedEntriesError: This work type already has saved entries. Create a new work type instead.

unitTypes.emptyDescription: Add the first unit you count during work.
unitTypes.unitsPerHourHelper: How many you usually complete in one hour.
unitTypes.deactivateDescription: Historical entry snapshots remain unchanged. This only removes the unit from future entry creation.

validation.unitsPerHour: Units per hour must be greater than zero

import.title: Import Excel
import.description: Preview a schedule workbook before anything is saved into your account.
import.uploadDescription: Roomly reads supported .xlsx schedule workbooks, shows you a preview first, then imports only the safe rows you confirm.
import.previewDescription: Review the detected months, totals, warnings and conflicts before importing.
import.resultDescription: Roomly imported the approved rows for {{year}}.
import.historyDescription: Review previous schedule imports and safely undo a completed batch when needed.
import.emptyHistoryDescription: Preview a workbook to start your first import batch.
import.detailDescription: Review what this batch imported and whether it can still be undone safely.
import.undoDescription: Only the entries and absences created by this batch will be removed. Manual data stays untouched.
import.canImportFalse: This workbook cannot be imported until the blocking conflicts are resolved.
import.noPreview: Choose a workbook and build a preview before importing.

discardDescription: Your unsaved edits will be lost.
